grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/02บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json
raw_text: ระแนงบังแดดเหล็ก ดูแบบขยาย (A-16), บัวปูนปั้น กว้าง 0.10 ม ลึก 0.10 ม. เซาะร่อง หรือฝังเส้น PVC (called out twice). Sloped roofline visible edge-on with a small angle marker printed '6' (legible here, matching the roof plan's SLOPE 6°). Grid callouts along the bottom, left to right: A, B, C, D, E, F, dimension chain 1.60 | 3.15 | 1.80 | 3.60 | 2.00 | 4.00 (=14.55).
description: Elevation 4 (รูปด้าน 4) — the opposite short-side facade from รูปด้าน 2, viewed from outside grid4 (east side), spanning gridA to gridF, showing the roof's monopitch slope edge-on (mirrored direction from รูปด้าน 2). Steel sunshade lattice above a window group near gridF, plain wall with a cornice band and PVC reveal joints below. Level datum: ±0.00 to +0.60 (floor) to +3.75 (roof beam level, not separately re-labeled on this half but consistent with the other elevations).
warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): dimension chain 1.60|3.15|1.80|3.60|2.00|4.00 (total 14.55) exactly matches the master grid's y_lines read right-to-left (A=0 local /F=14.55 local, i.e. gridA to gridF) — fully consistent with the master grid's absolute positions (F=0.0...A=14.55), no dummy grid needed. The leading 1.60m before gridA on this elevation matches the same 1.60m south canopy/carport overhang zone seen on elevation 2 (หน้า08).
This page (A-07) contains two elevations; the first (รูปด้าน 3) is in sibling file _หน้า09_elevation3.json.

Roof-pitch angle marker on this sheet is legibly '6' (unlike the ambiguous '9'-looking digit on elevation 2's equivalent callout) — corroborates the roof plan's 'SLOPE 6°' as the correct reading and supports treating elevation 2's similar digit as a misread/very-small-scale rendering artifact rather than a genuine different pitch.
